name: agent-collab
description: Cross-model diff review skills for an installed, MCP-connected agent-collab daemon

interface.shortDescription: Independent cross-model reviews for code diffs
interface.longDescription: Run one or two independent model reviews of the current diff through a locally installed and MCP-connected agent-collab daemon, then validate and reconcile the findings.
defaultPrompt: Get a second model's review of my current diff.
Run two independent reviews and reconcile the findings.
